privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json, therefore no privileged information claims to verify. The task uses real image data from Unsplash. GIMP's Drop Shadow filter is located in Filters → Light and Shadow → Drop Shadow menu as documented in official GIMP 2.10, 3.0 documentation and confirmed via web search. Primary image source: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542291026-7eec264c27ff (800x533 JPEG, accessible). Fallback source: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1549298916-b41d501d3772 (800x572 JPEG, accessible). Verifier implements shadow detection via luminance analysis with thresholds: shadow area 5-30% of image, luminance decrease 10-30%, shadow brightness minimum 20 and mean minimum 40. Success requires ≥75% of 4 criteria met.
